# SHI International Executive Team

The SHI International Executive Team is rated a "B-" and led by CEO Thai Lee. SHI International employees rate their Executive Team in the Top 40% of similar size companies on Comparably with 1,001-5,000 Employees.

Hispanic or Latino employees and employees who have been at the company 2 to 5 Years are more confident in their Executive Team, while employees with 1 to 3 Years experience and Female employees think there is room for improvement. Out of their 5 competitors, Softchoice, Insight, CDW Corporation, PCM, and En Pointe Technologies, SHI International's score ranks in 4th place.

Last updated a month ago.

### SHI International Executive Team At a Glance

The Executive Team Score of 69/100 is calculated by combining aggregate responses to the questions of “How would you rate your executive team?” and “Do you approve of the job your executive team is doing at your company?”

71% of employees say “Yes, they approve of the job the executive team is doing at SHI International”, with 80% of employees with Over 10 Years experience saying yes.

The last rating scoring SHI International's executive team was provided a month ago and has remained stable at 69 over the last 90 days.
